metadata.name: witchcraft (Grow Mix) (moebius remix)
metadata.author: fiShbRaiN, geiss + flexi
metadata.source: fiShbRaiN, geiss + flexi - witchcraft (Grow Mix) (moebius remix).milk

perFrameCode: // custom beat detection code: (fps-independent; quiet songs don't freak out)
min_att    = 2.5;               // lower # = quieter songs can declare beats
decay_to   = 0.8;               // lower # = more hasty to declare a beat
decay_rate = pow(0.9990, fps);  // lower # = more hasty to declare a beat
// z -> (az+b)/(cz-d); where a,b,c,d are complex numbers and z will be the uv-vector
// so a/c and mu can be calculated outside of the shader
